executives.name: Heidi Roizen
executives.background: Ms. Roizen has served as a member of our board of directors since December 2021. She is a Partner at Threshold Ventures.

executives.name: Keith Taylor
executives.background: Keith D. Taylor has served as our Chief Financial Officer since September 2005. He joined Equinix in 1999 and has held various roles including Director of Finance and Administration, and Vice President, Finance and Chief Accounting Officer.
